acceptance_policy: Materialize only current Penn attending groups with a dated recent official Penn Faculty Biosketch residency/fellowship/internship bridge. A separate provider-page Penn-training claim is useful corroboration but is not required when the official biosketch itself supplies the dated Penn training line. Keep as review-ready until an explicit reviewer acceptance decision is recorded.
required_reviewer_action: Confirm same-person identity, current Penn endpoint, training line, program type, and dates before promoting to an accepted trend fact.
